from __future__ import annotations

import random
import time


def python_perf_layer_network_calls_retry_without_backoff_or_jitter_negative(send):
    for attempt in range(5):
        if send():
            return True
        delay = (2 ** attempt) * 0.01 + random.uniform(0.0, 0.005)
        time.sleep(delay)
    return False
